creator: jmallett@xMach.org
text:
ratfor is definitely Rational Fortran, and not Ration Fortran. Search on 
Google for ratfor excluding FreeBSD-related info never brings up 'Ration 
Fortran'.

It is probably a good thing to have the port's name show up correctly. 

Here's a patch:

--- comment-orig        Wed Aug 15 14:43:52 2001
+++ pkg-comment Wed Aug 15 14:44:00 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-Ratfor -- the Ration FORTRAN compiler
+Ratfor -- the Rational FORTRAN compiler
